exam_format: Training + exam or direct exam; some tracks emphasize hands-on projects and portfolios

testing_centers.provider: IABAC Authorized Training Providers (ATPs) + Exam Portal
testing_centers.notes: Certifications are typically earned via ATP training + exam or direct exam purchase. EDISON-aligned framework. Renewal every 3 years. Global recognition with focus on practical Data Science + AI skills.

id_requirements: Valid ID for proctored exams; IABAC portal account.
exam_rules: Follow IABAC exam policy and any ATP proctoring requirements. Many include project or hands-on components in addition to knowledge exams.
renewal_options: Renewal every 3 years via CPD, re-examination, or approved activities per IABAC guidelines.

retake_policy.notes: Retake policies are defined per program/exam; ATPs often provide discounted retakes after additional training.

domains.name: Data Preparation and Feature Engineering for AI
Ethics, Bias, and Responsible AI Basics
